regex.target: description:"斜杠命令菜单提示的排序顺序"

regex.target: description:"自定义所有消息的系统提示，可能导致意外行为！"

regex.target: description:"启用 API 密钥加密。"

regex.target: description:"调试模式会将一些调试信息记录到控制台。"

regex.source: description:"Add the currently selected model to model List. After adding, please check the Model Tab."
regex.target: description:"将当前选中的模型添加到模型列表。添加后，请检查模型选项卡。"

regex.source: description:"Select the Chat model to use"
regex.target: description:"选择要使用的对话模型"

regex.source: description:"Choose where to open the plugin"
description:"The default folder name where chat conversations will be saved. Default is 'copilot-conversations'"
regex.target: description:"保存对话的默认文件夹名称，默认为 'copilot-conversations'"

regex.source: description:"The default tag to be used when saving a conversation. Default is 'ai-conversations'"
regex.target: description:"保存对话时使用的默认标签，默认为 'copilot-conversations'"

regex.source: description:"Automatically saves the chat after every user message and AI response."
regex.target: description:"在每条用户消息和 AI 响应后自动保存对话。"

regex.source: description:"Show suggested prompts in the chat view"
regex.target: description:"在对话视图中显示建议提示"

regex.source: description:"Show relevant notes in the chat view"
regex.target: description:"在对话视图中显示相关笔记"

regex.source: description:"Automatically include the current note in the chat context menu by default when sending messages to the AI."
regex.target: description:"默认情况下，发送消息给 AI 时自动将当前笔记包含在对话上下文菜单中。"

regex.source: description:"Pass embedded images in markdown to the AI along with the text. Only works with multimodal models."
regex.target: description:"将 Markdown 中的嵌入式图像与文本一起传递给 AI。仅适用于多模态模型。"

regex.source: description:"Suggest completions for partially typed words based on your vault's content. Requires at least 3 characters to trigger."
regex.target: description:"根据库内容为部分输入的单词提供补全建议。至少需要输入 3 个字符才能触发。"

regex.source: description:"Rebuild the word index to include new words from your vault. The index is automatically built when the plugin loads."
regex.target: description:"重建单词索引以包含库中的新单词。插件加载时会自动构建索引。"

regex.source: description:"Allow the AI to access relevant notes to provide more relevant suggestions. When off, the AI can only see the current note context."
regex.target: description:"允许 AI 访问相关笔记以提供更相关的建议。关闭时，AI 只能看到当前笔记上下文。"

regex.source: description:"Enter OpenAI Organization ID if applicable"
regex.target: description:"如果适用，请输入 OpenAI 组织 ID"

regex.source: description:"This is your actual model, no need to pass a model name separately."
regex.target: description:"这是您的实际模型，无需单独传递模型名称。"

regex.source: description:"Leave it blank, unless you are using a proxy."
regex.target: description:"留空，除非您正在使用代理。"

regex.source: description:"The number of previous conversation turns to include in the context. Default is 15 turns, i.e. 30 messages."
regex.target: description:"上下文中包含的先前对话轮数，默认为 15 轮，即 30 条消息。"

regex.source: description:"Copilot goes through your vault to find relevant blocks and passes the top N blocks to the LLM. Default for N is 3. Increase if you want more sources included in the answer generation step."
regex.target: description:"Copilot 会遍历您的库以查找相关块，并将前 N 个块传递给 LLM。N 默认为 3。如果需要更多来源参与答案生成步骤，请增加此值。"

regex.source: description:"Default is 90. Decrease if you are rate limited by your embedding provider."
regex.target: description:"默认为 90。如果您的嵌入提供者限制了速率，请减少此值。"

regex.source: description:"Default is 16. Increase if you are rate limited by your embedding provider."
regex.target: description:"默认为 16。如果您的嵌入提供者限制了速率，请增加此值。"

regex.source: description:"Number of partitions for Copilot index. Default is 1. Increase if you have issues indexing large vaults. Warning: Changes require clearing and rebuilding the index!"
regex.target: description:"Copilot 索引的分区数，默认为 1。如果索引大型库时遇到问题，请增加此值。警告：更改需要清除并重建索引！"

regex.source: description:"If enabled, the index will be stored in the .obsidian folder and synced with Obsidian Sync by default. If disabled, it will be stored in .copilot-index folder at vault root."
regex.target: description:"如果启用，索引将默认存储在 .obsidian 文件夹中并与 Obsidian Sync 同步。如果禁用，索引将存储在库根目录的 .copilot-index 文件夹中。"

regex.source: description:"When enabled, Copilot index won't be loaded on mobile devices to save resources. Only chat mode will be available. Any existing index from desktop sync will be preserved. Uncheck to enable QA modes on mobile."
regex.target: description:"启用后，Copilot 索引将不会在移动设备上加载以节省资源。仅对话模式可用。桌面同步的任何现有索引将被保留。取消勾选以在移动设备上启用 QA 模式。"

text:"- {FolderPath} represents a folder of notes. "
regex.target: text:"-{FolderPath}代表一个包含笔记的文件夹。"

regex.target: text:"- {#tag1, #tag2} 表示包含任意指定标签（OR逻辑运算）的所有笔记（标签需定义在笔记属性中）。"

regex.target: text:"通过笔记路径检查Copilot索引"

"API key required for chat and QA features"

regex.source: "Chat:")," Regular chat mode for general conversations and tasks. "

regex.source: "Free to use with your own API key."
regex.target: "使用自己的 API 密钥即可免费使用。"

regex.source: "Copilot Plus:")," Covers all features of the 2 free modes, plus advanced paid features including chat context menu, advanced search, AI agents, and more. Check out"
regex.target: "Copilot Plus:"),"涵盖 2 种免费模式的所有功能，以及对话上下文菜单、高级搜索、AI agents等高级付费功能。查看"

regex.source: "Customize the format of saved conversation note names."
regex.target: "自定义保存的对话笔记名称的格式。"

regex.source: "Note: All the following variables must be included in the template."
regex.target: "注意：模板中必须包含以下所有变量。"

regex.source: "Copilot Plus takes your Obsidian experience to the next level with cutting-edge AI capabilities. This premium tier unlocks advanced features, including chat context, PDF and image support, web search integration, exclusive chat and embedding models, and much more."
regex.target: "Copilot Plus 通过最先进的人工智能功能将您的 Obsidian 体验提升到新的水平。该高级功能包括对话上下文、PDF 和图片支持、网络搜索集成、独家对话和嵌入模型等。"

regex.source: "Currently in beta, Copilot Plus is evolving fast, with new features and improvements rolling out regularly. Join now to secure the lowest price and get early access!"
regex.target: "目前处于测试阶段的 Copilot Plus 发展迅速，定期推出新功能和改进。现在加入，以确保以最低价格尽早使用！"

regex.source: "Configure your AI providers by adding their API keys."
regex.target: "通过添加他们的API密钥来配置您的AI提供商。"

regex.source: "Custom commands are preset prompts that you can trigger in the editor by right-clicking and selecting them from the context menu or by using a ",it.default.createElement("code",null,"/")," command in the chat to load them into your chat input."
regex.target: "自定义命令是预设的提示，您可以在编辑器中右击并从上下文菜单中选择它们，或者在聊天中使用",it.default.createElement("code",null,"/")," 命令将它们加载到聊天输入中，从而触发这些提示。"

regex.source: "Commands are automatically loaded from .md files in your custom prompts folder"," ",it.default.createElement("strong",null,o.customPromptsFolder),". Modifying the files will also update the command settings."
regex.target: "命令会自动从自定义提示文件夹" ,it.default.createElement("strong",null,o.customPromptsFolder),"中的.md文件加载。","修改文件也会更新命令设置。"

regex.source: "This will add default commands to your custom prompts folder. Do you want to continue?"
regex.target: "这将把默认命令添加到您的自定义提示文件夹中。您想继续吗？"

regex.source: "Enter a name for your new custom command. A markdown file will be created in your custom prompts folder."
regex.target: "输入新自定义命令的名称。将在自定义提示文件夹中创建一个markdown文件。"

regex.target: '选择用于接受建议的按键。默认值为“Tab”。'

regex.target: "用于接受自动补全建议的按键"

regex.source: "Resetting settings will clear all settings and restore the default values. You will lose any custom settings you have made including the API keys. Are you sure you want to continue?"
regex.target: "重置设置将清除所有设置并恢复默认值。您将丢失您所做的任何自定义设置，包括API密钥。您确定要继续吗？"

regex.source: "Warning: Cost implications for large vaults with paid models"
regex.target: "警告： 对使用付费模型的大型库有成本影响"

regex.source: "Exclude folders, tags, note titles or file extensions from being indexed. Previously indexed files will remain until a force re-index is performed."
regex.target: "从索引中排除文件夹、标签、笔记标题或文件扩展名。已索引的文件将保留，直到执行强制重新索引。"

regex.source: "Index only the specified paths, tags, or note titles. Exclusions take precedence over inclusions. Previously indexed files will remain until a force re-index is performed."
regex.target: "仅索引指定的路径、标签或笔记标题。排除规则的优先级高于包含规则。已索引的文件将保留，直至执行强制重新索引。"

regex.source: "Please note that this is a retrieval-based QA. Questions should contain keywords and concepts that exist literally in your vault"
regex.target: "请注意，这是一个基于检索的QA。问题应包含您的库中实际存在的关键字和概念"
